_comment: Snippet to merge into your ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json. Add the fable-mythos-modus skill path to 'instructions' if not auto-discovered.

mythos-singleshot-thinking-intelligence.description: Parallel-fired Mythos Single-Forward-Pass thinking agent (3x parallel in Phase 0 of MAP). Each instance emits a thinking-pass output, no artifact. MAP Part 0.

mythos-executor.description: Primary artifact generator in MAP (Phase 1). Receives 3 thinking passes, selects/combines strongest, builds artifact. Applies all Mythos principles.

mythos-verifier.description: Verification agent in MAP (Phase 2). Checks executor artifact against ground truth with 10-point multi-criteria check. Every finding needs citation.

mythos-adversary.description: Red-team agent in MAP (Phase 2). Actively tries to break executor artifact: edge cases, race conditions, abuse, hallucination hunting, anti-hack, security.

mythos-synthesizer.description: Final-decision agent in MAP (Phase 3). Aggregates executor+verifier+adversary, resolves contradictions, decides SHIP or REJECT+LOOP. Has the last word.
